prompt: A high-quality Japanese food advertisement banner. The background features a warm, softly blurred wooden table with golden rice stalks. On the center-right, a bowl of steaming white rice topped with a raw egg yolk and soy sauce being poured over it sits in a vertically striped ceramic bowl. To the right, a small white dish contains exactly 3 slices of pickles (one green cucumber, one orange carrot, one white radish), alongside a blurred wooden miso soup bowl. In the top-left corner, large elegant Japanese typography reads 甘み、つや、粘り。三拍子そろったおいしさ。 with a smaller subheadline below reading 日本の食卓に、最高の一杯を。. In the bottom-left corner, a 5kg plastic bag of rice is displayed with the label 新潟県産 こしひかり. In the top-right corner, a circular gold foil award badge displays the text 米の食味ランキング 特A 獲得. Small fine print runs along the bottom right edge. The lighting is warm, appetizing, and professional, highlighting the glossy texture of the rice and egg.
